title: Forcemaster (More RPG Classes)
description: Grab a Knuckle, master the force and martial art. Spell Engine Add-On
body:
# **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1159/655/forcemaster_banner-png.png)** # **👊Grab a Knuckle, master the force and martial art!** *** [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric|neoforge-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forcemaster-rpg-class) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu) [![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Forcemaster) *** # **📂 Installation** *** ### **🚨Required Mods** - [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine 'Title') - [More RPG Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rpg-classes 'Title') - [Azure Lib Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib-armor 'Title') ### **👍Highly Recommended Mods** - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat 'Title') *** # **🕹️ Features** The Forcemaster class is a hybrid martial artist using fist weapons called "Knuckles". The class enhances its fighting abilities by casting spells.This class is inspired from the MMORPG FLYFF (Fly For Fun). ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1388/152/forcemaster_showcase-png.png) ## **✨Spells** Make use of the new Forcemaster-Skills and Spells to make fighting and combat more fun, by equipping a Spell Book and unlocking all of its powerful spells! To do it, find a Spell Binding Table in village [Gazebos](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos), or build your own (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table). To use the spell books: equip them and hold a weapon (vanilla, or even third party mods). ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1388/153/forcemaster_spells-png.png) **Force Mastery** This spell book offers a fast attacking fighter, that can stun and knock up its targets and deal a high amount of damage in a short time. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1388/150/forcemaster_combat-png.png) ## 🤺Combat & Equipment * Craft new the martial art weapons, the Knuckles! * They're enhanced with arcane force magic to enhance each hit ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1388/151/forcemaster_equipment-png.png)
⚙️Configuration
  • Armor & Weapon bonuses:
  • _config/forcemaster_rpg/items.json
  • Tweaks:
  • _config/forcemaster_rpg/tweaks.json
  • Status Effects:
  • config/forcemaster_rpg/effects.json
🤝Mod Compability
  • BetterEnd
  • BetterNether
  • Armory
🎥 Showcases

Thanks to all content creators for showcasing my Mod😊!

🙌Credits

 

  • GALA Lab for creating Flyff and inspiring this mod!
  • Deadelus for creating the amazing Spell Engine API
  • HaxTheCharizard for creating the Knuckle 3D Models & Oriene Armor Set Model
  • Slepykat for creating the other Armor Set Models
  • Damienbrittan for creating the awesome Mod Banner!
  • Emil for creating the Knuckle Inventory Textures
  • Pedravila for creating the LNE-Knuckle Models

 

*** ### **🧙‍♂️Check out my other RPG themed Mods!** [![Archers Expansion](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/709/archers_expansion_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers-expansion) [![Berserker](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/710/berserker_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class) [![Elemental Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/711/elemental_wizards_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg)[![Witcher](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/713/witcher_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class) *** ### **Want to play more RPG content? Check out the RPG Series Mods created by Daedelus!** [![Archers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/169/archers_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) [![Paladins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/170/paladins_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) [![Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/171/wizards_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) [![Rogues](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/332/rogues_full_bg_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) [![Jewelry](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/760/387/jewelry_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) [![Relics](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/296/relics_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg) [![Arsenal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/295/arsenal_full_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal-rpg-series) [![Armory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/866/armory_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/armory-rpg-series) [![Skill Tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/865/skilltree_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skill-tree) *** ### **Check out more RPG-Content created by other Spell Engine Dev's** [![Anarchy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1358/177/anarchy-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/anarchy-rpg) [![Mercenaries and Artificers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1346/857/merc_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mercenaries-and-artificers) [![Death Knigths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/953/998/death_knights_275_2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights)
